perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black mesh-accented top, stands in a Costco bakery aisle holding a strawberry cake box. She smiles and speaks directly to the camera. (2) The camera pans across refrigerated shelves displaying various Kirkland Signature cakes, including a carrot-decorated cake and a chocolate cake with a pink rose. A male hand enters the frame to point at the carrot cake. (3) The woman gives a thumbs-up gesture and continues talking, showing a small screen on her phone attached to a lanyard. (4) A close-up shot focuses on the carrot cake, revealing subtle grid lines in the frosting. (5) The camera returns to the woman holding the strawberry cake in front of the shelves as she makes a final comment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic pop background music plays continuously. A young woman speaks with an excited and friendly tone in Taiwanese Mandarin. (2) A man's voice is heard off-camera, engaging in a playful dialogue with the woman about the cake choices. (3) Low-level ambient noise of a large retail warehouse, such as the hum of refrigeration units, is audible in the background. (4) A sharp 'ding' sound effect coincides with the appearance of highlight text on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '請問誰生日了嗎' (Is it someone's birthday?), '有人生日嗎' (Is someone having a birthday?), '為什麼要買蛋糕' (Why buy a cake?), '新的一年 大家都是新生' (New year, everyone is a newborn). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top. '蛋糕隱藏設計 原來是為了...' (Cake hidden design, turns out it's for...) appears in yellow and pink bubbly font to create curiosity. '399 更便宜' (399 is even cheaper) highlights the price point.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Comparison -> Discovery of Design -> Price Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator on screen, 1 male hand pointing at products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top with sheer/ruffled sleeves and a silver necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial refrigerated warehouse shelves at a Costco, filled with various packaged bakery items and cakes.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Exploration -> Revelation -> CTA/Value Statement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a casual shopping vlog intended to share a consumer 'discovery' at Costco. It uses a conversation between two people to highlight a practical design feature of a large sheet cake (grid lines for easy portioning) and its affordable price, encouraging viewers to consider it for group events or kids' parties.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Filmed entirely within a specific retail store showing specific private-label products (Kirkland Signature) with positive commentary and price highlights.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Conversational interaction with an off-screen videographer; bright, variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'hidden tip' or 'secret feature' trope common in social media retail content to drive engagement.
